navigationCategory.label: Shared category
navigationCategory.helpText: Optional. When set, every selected Shop page slide opens inside this one category context.
navigationCategory.placeholder: Select one category for all slides...

linkType.label: Link type
linkType.helpText: Choose what kind of target this slide should open.

shopPage.label: Shop page
shopPage.helpText: Select a Shop page layout for this slide. This avoids creating a separate category per look.

seoUrl.label: Category or product detail page
seoUrl.helpText: Select a storefront category or product detail URL for this slide.

customUrl.label: Custom URL
customUrl.helpText: Enter any absolute or relative URL for this slide.
